headline: Omnicom Interpublic Deal Reshapes Group And Raises Investor Integration Focus
summary: Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) has completed its acquisition of Interpublic Group, creating a larger global advertising and marketing services company. Following the deal, management has outlined a new company structure and priorities at its Investor Day, with a focus on integrating operations and capturing synergies. For investors watching NYSE:OMC, the combined group represents a clear step up in scale and service breadth. The stock recently closed at $77.8, with a 12.2% gain over the past 30...
